sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26396" key="digwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δι-γωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n26396.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">angle half-way between cardinal points,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:163" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.163</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
